{"society_power": 0.9, "state_power": 6.3, "society_change": -0.1, "state_change": 0.8, "key_event": "WWI mobilization, extractive boom, Kimbangu suppression", "reasoning": "The maturing Belgian colonial bureaucracy, wartime Force Publique mobilization, railway expansion, and growing extractive concessions (Union Mini\u00e8re) deepened state coercive and administrative reach, while forced labor, taxation, epidemics, and the swift crushing of the 1921 Kimbanguist movement kept autonomous society near its atomized floor."}
